# JetForge

> JetForge is a fair-launch Solana token launchpad — the pump.fun alternative built on Solana devnet.

## What is JetForge?

JetForge lets anyone launch a Solana SPL token in seconds using a bonding curve pricing model. No presales, no team allocations — every token starts at the same price and graduates to a DEX when it reaches the liquidity threshold.

## How it works

1. **Launch** — Connect a Solana wallet and pay a small fee to deploy your token on-chain. Set a name, symbol, description, and image.
2. **Trade** — Anyone can buy or sell tokens instantly against the bonding curve. Price increases as more SOL flows in.
3. **Graduate** — When a token raises enough SOL (85 SOL target), it graduates to a decentralized exchange (DEX) for open trading.

## Key Features

- Bonding curve pricing (constant product AMM)
- Real-time price charts (candlestick, OHLCV)
- Live trade feed via WebSocket
- Anti-rug score per token
- Whale alert system
- Token comments / live chat
- Creator verification badges
- Watchlist (localStorage)
- King of the Hill — top token by 24h volume
- Portfolio tracker per wallet
- Creator leaderboard

## Technology

- **Blockchain**: Solana (devnet)
- **Smart contract**: Anchor framework
- **Frontend**: Next.js 16, React, TailwindCSS
- **Backend**: Express.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL
- **Real-time**: Socket.IO WebSockets
- **Indexer**: Solana `onLogs` subscription parsing Anchor events

## API

Public REST API available at `https://app.jetforge.io/api`:

- `GET /api/tokens` — list tokens (sort: new, trending, graduating, graduated)
- `GET /api/tokens/:mint` — single token details
- `GET /api/tokens/:mint/ohlcv` — candlestick price data
- `GET /api/trades/:mint` — trade history for a token
- `GET /api/stats` — platform stats (total tokens, 24h volume, 24h trades)
- `GET /api/leaderboard/tokens` — top tokens by volume/marketcap/trades
- `GET /api/leaderboard/traders` — top traders by volume

## Links

- App: https://app.jetforge.io
- Launch a token: https://app.jetforge.io/launch
- Leaderboard: https://app.jetforge.io/leaderboard
- FAQ: https://app.jetforge.io/faq
